vocab.word: dedicate a significant chunk of time
vocab.meaning: dành ra một khoảng thời gian đáng kể
vocab.example: I usually dedicate a significant chunk of time each evening to reviewing my lecture notes.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm hoàn toàn vào việc gì đó
vocab.example: During exam season, I immerse myself in my research for at least eight hours a day to ensure a deep understanding.

vocab.meaning: các nghĩa vụ hoặc công việc học tập
vocab.example: Balancing my academic commitments with a part-time job requires meticulous time management.

vocab.meaning: các buổi học cường độ cao
vocab.example: I prefer short, intensive study sessions over long, unproductive hours of staring at a textbook.
I strictly allocate time for both self-study and collaborative group projects every single day.
I find that I can absorb information much more effectively in the early hours of the morning when my mind is fresh.

vocab.meaning: ngập đầu trong (công việc, bài tập)
vocab.example: Currently, I am swamped with coursework, so I spend nearly all my waking hours in the library.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung cao độ nhất
vocab.example: I try to tackle the most demanding subjects during my hours of peak concentration, which is usually right after breakfast.
As a diligent student, I make it a point to study for at least four hours daily, regardless of my schedule.

vocab.meaning: ưu tiên khối lượng công việc
vocab.example: To avoid feeling overwhelmed, I always prioritize my workload and tackle the most urgent assignments first.
